title: tragacantha phlomoides
intro: Tragacantha phlomoides, also known as Phlomis phlomoides, is a perennial plant species within the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Tragacantha phlomoides include its potential to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. Tragacantha phlomoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to create topical creams and ointments for wound healing and skin conditions.
